## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 13, 2026*

### Superconductivity (11 new today)

1. The study focuses on **superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs)**, employing **advanced materials and fabrication techniques** to address/solve **the discrepancy between their theoretical and demonstrated performance limits**.
2. The study focuses on **Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelate films**, employing **angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) with varied photon energies** to address/solve **understanding their three-dimensional electronic structure and superconducting mechanism**.
3. The study focuses on **superconducting qubit noise**, employing **a method that converts frequency noise into photon loss in a coupled high-Q cavity** to address/solve **the bandwidth and operational limitations of conventional qubit-based noise-sensing techniques**.
4. The study focuses on **a two-band *t*-*J* model for bilayer nickelates**, employing **variational Monte Carlo simulations** to address/solve **identifying the orbital-selective origin and pairing symmetry of superconductivity**.
5. The study focuses on **twisted bilayer cuprates**, employing **theoretical modeling of a multicomponent order parameter** to address/solve **the emergence of topological superconductivity from interlayer coupling**.
6. The study focuses on **a superconducting resonator under an off-resonant drive**, employing **fast-forward scaling theory for drive modulation** to address/solve **achieving perfect quantum state displacement for high-speed gates in Kerr-cat qubits**.
7. The study focuses on **a spin-triplet superconductor model**, employing **analysis of the Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian with perpendicular spin vectors** to address/solve **the theoretical conditions for realizing reentrant superconductivity under a Zeeman field**.
8. The study focuses on **thin type-II superconducting shells**, employing **a spectral method with Chebyshev polynomial expansions** to address/solve **the efficient numerical modeling of magnetization in axisymmetric, non-flat geometries**.
9. The study focuses on **CaZrO3/KTaO3 (001) heterointerfaces**, employing **transport measurements and characterization** to address/solve **the unresolved question of two-dimensional superconductivity at (001)-oriented KTaO3 interfaces**.
10. The study focuses on **La2PrNi2O7-δ thin films**, employing **structural and transport analysis** to address/solve **the origin of the two-step resistive transition and its link to granular superconductivity**.
11. The study focuses on **a two-orbital model on a square lattice**, employing **random phase approximation (RPA)** to address/solve **identifying regimes of instability toward incommensurate d-wave pair density wave superconductivity**.

### spin glass (2 new today)

1. The study focuses on **quantum state ansätze for variational algorithms**, employing **swap network augmentation and connectivity-adapted circuit design** to address **the challenge of generating long-range qubit correlations on hardware with limited connectivity**.
2. The study focuses on **continuous modern Hopfield networks (Dense Associative Memory)**, employing **statistical mechanical analysis of geometric entropy and phase transitions** to address **the characterization of thermodynamic memory capacity and retrieval dynamics under geometric constraints**.

| 1 | **[Reaching the intrinsic performance limits of superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors up to 0.1 mm wide](https://arxiv.org/abs/2601.15971v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting nanowire single-photon detectors (SNSPDs) combine high detection efficiency, low noise, and excellent timing resolution, making them a leading platform for photon-counting applications. However, despite decades of materials and fabrication research, detector performance has never been shown to match theoretical performance expectations. Here, we demonstrate for the first time in situ tuning of a detector from its typical, suboptimal operation, to a regime limited only by material quality, allowing the device to reach its intrinsic performance limit. Our approach is based on current-biased superconducting "rails" placed on either side of the detector that redistribute current across its width to achieve its peak performance. This technique not only reduces the dark count rate by ten orders of magnitude, but also enables future detectors to overcome the Pearl limit for device width, paving the way for arbitrarily large detectors. We show operation at this intrinsic performance limit for devices up to 0.1 mm wide, and also demonstrate near-unity internal detection efficiency (IDE) at a wavelength of 4um for a 20um-wide detector--a factor of 20 wider than the current state of the art.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导纳米线单光子探测器（SNSPDs）集高探测效率、低噪声和优异的时间分辨率于一体，使其成为光子计数应用的主要平台。然而，尽管经过了数十年的材料和制备研究，探测器的性能从未达到理论预期。在此，我们首次演示了将探测器从其典型的次优工作状态原位调控至仅受材料质量限制的区间，从而使器件达到其内在性能极限。我们的方法基于放置在探测器两侧的电流偏置超导"导轨"，这些导轨重新分配了探测器宽度上的电流，以实现其峰值性能。该技术不仅将暗计数率降低了十个数量级，还使未来的探测器能够突破器件宽度的珀尔极限，为制造任意大尺寸的探测器铺平了道路。我们展示了宽度达0.1毫米的器件在此内在性能极限下的工作，并演示了20微米宽的探测器在4微米波长下接近100%的内部探测效率（IDE）——其宽度是目前最先进水平的20倍。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Kristen M. Parzuchowski et al. |
| 2 | **[Three-Dimensional Electronic Structures in Superconducting Ruddlesden-Popper Bilayer Nickelate Films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08430v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Beyond the quasi-two-dimensional (2D) paradigm of cuprates, the role of the third dimension of the Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelates is essential to decoding their superconducting mechanism. Here, using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) with varied photon energies, we systematically investigate the electronic band structures in three dimensions for superconducting (La,Pr,Sm)$_3$Ni$2$O$7$/SrLaAlO$4$ thin films (superconducting onset temperature $T_c^{\text{onset}} \sim 48$ K) transferred via a cryogenic ultra-high vacuum suitcase. We reveal an orbital-dependent dimensionality: while the $d{x^2-y^2}$-dominant bands exhibit a quasi-2D character, the $d{z^2}$-dominant band displays a finite $k_z$ dispersion. Finite energy gaps are identified on all observed bands across multiple high-symmetry directions. Systematic temperature-dependent analysis characterizes the superconducting nature of the gap on the $d{z^2}$-derived band, revealing a large gap $Δ\sim 18$ meV and a ratio $2Δ/k_BT_c\sim 8$ exceeding the weak-coupling BCS limit. The suppression of spectral weight near the Fermi level persists above the superconducting transition temperature. Ubiquitous waterfall-like spectral features evidence the presence of electron interactions. These results underscore the role of the $d_{z^2}$ orbital and correlations, placing constraints on theoretical models for nickelate superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超越铜酸盐的准二维范式，Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍酸盐的第三维度对于解读其超导机制至关重要。本文利用不同光子能量的角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES），系统地研究了通过低温超高真空转移箱转移的超导（La,Pr,Sm）$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$/SrLaAlO$_4$薄膜（超导起始温度$T_c^{\text{onset}} \sim 48$ K）的三维电子能带结构。我们揭示了一种轨道依赖的维度性：以$d_{x^2-y^2}$为主的能带表现出准二维特性，而以$d_{z^2}$为主的能带则显示出有限的$k_z$色散。在所有观测到的能带上的多个高对称方向上都识别出了有限的能隙。系统的温度依赖性分析表征了$d_{z^2}$衍生能带上能隙的超导性质，揭示了一个大能隙$Δ\sim 18$ meV以及比值$2Δ/k_BT_c\sim 8$超过了弱耦合BCS极限。费米能级附近谱权重的抑制在超导转变温度以上仍然持续。普遍存在的瀑布状谱特征证明了电子相互作用的存在。这些结果强调了$d_{z^2}$轨道和相关性的作用，为镍酸盐超导性的理论模型提供了约束。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Yueying Li et al. |
| 3 | **[Qubit Noise Sensing via Induced Photon Loss in a Superconducting Cavity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.06848v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Characterizing noise in superconducting qubits is essential for improving coherence and gate performance. Conventional noise-sensing methods typically use the qubit itself as the sensor, which limits both accessible bandwidth and applicability during driven operation. Here, we demonstrate a method for measuring qubit frequency noise by converting it into photon loss in a coupled high-Q superconducting cavity. We use repeated mid-circuit qubit measurements with post-selection to separate this induced loss from intrinsic cavity decay. We validate the protocol using injected noise and show that the extracted loss scales as expected with the applied noise strength. Without added noise, we place an upper bound of $5\times10^3\,\mathrm{Hz}^2/\,\mathrm{Hz}$ on the qubit frequency-noise power spectral density at 508 MHz. The protocol opens access to a higher-frequency spectral window than standard qubit-based spectroscopy and may enable noise characterization during strong driving.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>表征超导量子比特中的噪声对于提高相干性和门操作性能至关重要。传统的噪声传感方法通常使用量子比特本身作为传感器，这限制了可访问的带宽以及在驱动操作期间的适用性。在此，我们展示了一种通过将量子比特频率噪声转换为耦合的高Q值超导腔中的光子损耗来测量该噪声的方法。我们使用重复的电路中间量子比特测量并结合后选择，将这种诱导损耗与腔的本征衰减分离开来。我们通过注入噪声验证了该协议，并表明提取的损耗随施加噪声强度的变化符合预期。在没有外加噪声的情况下，我们在508 MHz频率处对量子比特频率噪声功率谱密度设定了$5\times10^3\,\mathrm{Hz}^2/\,\mathrm{Hz}$的上限。该协议开启了比标准基于量子比特的光谱学更高的频率谱窗口，并可能实现在强驱动下的噪声表征。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Nitzan Kahn et al. |
| 4 | **[Orbital-Selective $d$-wave Superconductivity in the Two-Band $t$-$J$ Model: Possible Applications to La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08319v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate superconductivity in a two-band $t$-$J$ model consisting of an itinerant orbital (orbital-0) and a quasi-localized orbital (orbital-1) using variational Monte Carlo. A robust orbital-selective $d$-wave superconducting state is found to emerge exclusively from the itinerant orbital. An analysis of the superexchange energy hierarchy shows that the quasi-localized orbital-1 competes with superconductivity by favoring local inter-orbital bound states, which act as energy defects and disrupt phase coherence. Consistently, the superconducting order parameter is monotonically suppressed as the occupancy of orbital-1 increases. Motivated by superconductivity in nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, these results highlight the essential role of multi-orbital physics beyond the single-band $t$-$J$ framework and point to a concrete route to enhance $T_c$: suppressing the involvement of localized $d_{z^2}$-derived orbitals.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用变分蒙特卡洛方法研究了一个由巡游轨道（轨道-0）和准局域轨道（轨道-1）组成的双带$t$-$J$模型中的超导电性。研究发现，一个稳健的轨道选择性$d$波超导态仅从巡游轨道中产生。对超交换能量层级的分析表明，准局域轨道-1通过倾向于形成局域轨道间束缚态而与超导性竞争，这些束缚态充当能量缺陷并破坏相位相干性。相应地，超导序参量随着轨道-1占据数的增加而单调被抑制。受镍酸盐La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$中超导性的启发，这些结果强调了超越单带$t$-$J$框架的多轨道物理的关键作用，并指出了一条提高$T_c$的具体途径：抑制局域$d_{z^2}$衍生轨道的参与。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Zhan Wang et al. |
| 5 | **[Topological multicomponent-pairing superconductivity in twisted bilayer cuprates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08235v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the emergence of a multicomponent superconducting state in twisted bilayer cuprates, characterized by the order parameter $s+d_1 e^{iφ_1}+d_2 e^{iφ_2}$, where $s=s_1+s_2$ denotes the symmetric combination of the layer-resolved $s$-wave components, and $s_i$ and $d_i$ ($i=1,2$) represent the $s$-wave and $d$-wave pairings associated with the individual layers. In particular, when $φ_1-φ_2\neq 0,π$, this three-component pairing state is topologically nontrivial. By combining Ginzburg--Landau analysis with self-consistent mean-field calculations based on a microscopic model, we show that such a topological three-component pairing state can be stabilized over a substantial parameter regime. Our results indicate that twisted bilayer cuprates can remain chiral and topological even in the presence of a sizable $s$-wave pairing component.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了扭转双层铜酸盐中多分量超导态的出现，其特征由序参量$s+d_1 e^{iφ_1}+d_2 e^{iφ_2}$描述，其中$s=s_1+s_2$表示层分辨$s$波分量的对称组合，$s_i$和$d_i$（$i=1,2$）代表与各单层相关的$s$波和$d$波配对。特别地，当$φ_1-φ_2\neq 0,π$时，这种三分量配对态在拓扑上是非平庸的。通过将金兹堡-朗道分析与基于微观模型的自洽平均场计算相结合，我们证明了这种拓扑三分量配对态可以在相当大的参数区间内稳定存在。我们的结果表明，即使存在相当大的$s$波配对分量，扭转双层铜酸盐仍可以保持手征性和拓扑性。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Yu-Hang Li et al. |
| 6 | **[Perfect displacement of a superconducting resonator via fast-forward scaling and its application to high-speed $R_{ZZ}$ gates in Kerr-cat qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.11056v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the fast-forward and time-scaling properties of superconducting resonators under an off-resonant coherent drive. We propose a scheme for perfect displacement of a superconducting resonator by modulating the drive amplitude based on fast-forward scaling theory. Furthermore, we propose a scheme exploiting both the fast-forward and time-scaling properties that enables perfect displacement through detuning modulation. The proposed schemes are also applicable to a subsystem that can be effectively represented by a driven resonator. In particular, we apply the latter scheme to fast and high-fidelity displacement of a coupler between Kerr parametric oscillators, which leads to high-speed $R_{ZZ}$ gates in Kerr-cat qubits.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了超导谐振器在非共振相干驱动下的快进与时间缩放特性。基于快进缩放理论，我们提出了一种通过调制驱动幅度实现超导谐振器完美位移的方案。此外，我们提出了一种同时利用快进与时间缩放特性的方案，该方案能够通过失谐调制实现完美位移。所提出的方案同样适用于可有效由受驱谐振器表示的子系统。特别地，我们将后一种方案应用于克尔参量振荡器之间耦合器的快速高保真度位移，从而在克尔猫量子比特中实现高速的 $R_{ZZ}$ 门。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Takaaki Aoki et al. |
| 7 | **[Reentrant Superconductivity in Zeeman Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.14507v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a theoretical model for a superconductor that exhibits the reentrant superconductivity in Zeeman fields. The Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian includes three vectors in spin space: a $d$ vector of a spin-triplet superconducting state, a potential representing spin-orbit interactions, and a Zeeman field. When the three vectors are perpendicular to one another, the spin-orbit interaction suppresses superconductivity in weak Zeeman fields and enhances superconductivity in strong Zeeman fields. The instability (stability) of superconducting state is characterized by the appearance of odd-frequency (even-frequency) Cooper pairs.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一个在塞曼场中表现出重入超导性的超导体理论模型。该 Bogoliubov-de Gennes 哈密顿量包含自旋空间中的三个矢量：自旋三重态超导态的 $d$ 矢量、代表自旋-轨道相互作用的势以及塞曼场。当这三个矢量彼此垂直时，自旋-轨道相互作用在弱塞曼场下抑制超导性，而在强塞曼场下增强超导性。超导态的不稳定性（稳定性）表现为奇频（偶频）库珀对的出现。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Tomoya Sano et al. |
| 8 | **[Spectral solution of axisymmetric magnetization problems for thin superconducting shells](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07947v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Existing numerical methods for modeling magnetization in thin type-II superconducting films have mostly been developed for flat films. This work introduces an efficient spectral method for axisymmetric magnetization problems involving non-flat films. The method is based on the integral thin-shell current-density formulation of the problem, employs Chebyshev polynomial expansions for spatial discretization, and uses the method of lines for time integration. It applies to both open and closed axisymmetric shells and is so accurate that the solutions obtained can serve as benchmarks for numerical methods for general, not necessarily axisymmetric, thin-shell magnetization problems. As one of the examples, we consider magnetic shielding by a superconducting sphere.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>现有的用于模拟薄型第二类超导薄膜磁化强度的数值方法大多是为平面薄膜开发的。本研究针对涉及非平面薄膜的轴对称磁化问题，引入了一种高效的光谱方法。该方法基于问题的积分薄壳电流密度公式，采用切比雪夫多项式展开进行空间离散化，并使用直线法进行时间积分。它适用于开放和封闭的轴对称壳，且精度极高，所获得的解可作为一般（不一定轴对称）薄壳磁化问题数值方法的基准。作为示例之一，我们考虑了超导球的磁屏蔽。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Leonid Prigozhin et al. |
| 9 | **[Two-Dimensional Superconductivity at the CaZrO3/KTaO3 (001) Heterointerfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.01392v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Two-dimensional superconductivity at KTaO3 (KTO) heterointerfaces has sparked intensive investigations since its discovery, yet whether the (001)-oriented KTO interface hosts superconductivity remains to be elucidated. Here, we provide unambiguous evidence of superconductivity in two-dimensional electron gases (2DEGs) at CaZrO3/KTO(001) heterointerfaces, with a superconducting transition TC up to ~0.25 K. Notably, TC increases linearly with carrier density nS over the range of 4.5*10^13~10.3*10^13 cm^-2. Furthermore, superconductivity exhibits a pronounced dependence on crystallographic orientation, with TC rising from 0.25 K for (001) to 1.04 K for (110) and 2.22 K for (111), underscoring the crucial role of interfacial symmetry in the CaZrO3/KTO system. The two-dimensional nature of the superconducting state is corroborated by the Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transition and the large anisotropy of the upper critical field. For the CaZrO3/KTO(001) sample with nS=7.7*10^13 cm^-2, the estimated Ginzburg-Landau coherence length ξGL=146.4 nm is larger than the superconducting layer thickness dSC=10.1 nm by a factor of ~14.5, confirming significant two-dimensional confinement of the CaZrO3/KTO(001) superconductor. In addition, we demonstrate that the two-dimensional superconductivity at the CaZrO3/KTO(001) interface can be effectively tuned by applying a back gate voltage. Our findings reveal the existence of two-dimensional superconductivity at CaZrO3/KTO(001), providing a new platform for exploring two-dimensional superconductivity at oxide interfaces.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>KTaO3 (KTO) 异质界面处的二维超导性自发现以来引发了广泛研究，然而(001)取向的KTO界面是否存在超导性仍有待阐明。本文，我们在CaZrO3/KTO(001)异质界面的二维电子气(2DEG)中提供了超导性的明确证据，其超导转变温度TC高达~0.25 K。值得注意的是，在载流子密度nS为4.5*10^13~10.3*10^13 cm^-2的范围内，TC随nS线性增加。此外，超导性表现出明显的晶体取向依赖性，TC从(001)取向的0.25 K升至(110)取向的1.04 K和(111)取向的2.22 K，突显了界面对称性在CaZrO3/KTO体系中的关键作用。超导态的二维特性得到了Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT)转变和上临界场强各向异性的证实。对于nS=7.7*10^13 cm^-2的CaZrO3/KTO(001)样品，估算的Ginzburg-Landau相干长度ξGL=146.4 nm约为超导层厚度dSC=10.1 nm的14.5倍，证实了CaZrO3/KTO(001)超导体显著的二维限域效应。此外，我们证明了通过施加背栅电压可以有效调控CaZrO3/KTO(001)界面的二维超导性。我们的研究结果揭示了CaZrO3/KTO(001)界面二维超导性的存在，为探索氧化物界面处的二维超导性提供了一个新平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Lu Chen et al. |
| 10 | **[Granular Superconductivity in La$_{2}$PrNi$_{2}$O$_{7-δ}$ Thin Films](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07807v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductivity realized in bilayer nickelate thin films enables direct spectroscopic and transport studies at ambient pressure. However, a persistent two-step resistive transition remains a major barrier to achieving optimal superconducting properties. Here, we show that the two-step transition in La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ thin films originates from the granular nature of superconductivity, specifically, the coexistence of two distinct superconducting grain phases coupled by a Josephson junction network. A secondary, lower-temperature transition appears in the $R(T)$ curve, even when residual resistance becomes vanishingly small near 30 K. This two-step behavior significantly lowers the zero-resistance transition temperature, $T_{c, zero}$$\approx$ 10 K, and limits advanced spectroscopic studies. Our findings reveal the microscopic mechanism underlying the two-step transition in thin films and underscore the need for improved oxygen homogeneity to achieve bulk superconductivity in this system.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在双层镍酸盐薄膜中实现的超导性使得在常压下直接进行光谱学和输运研究成为可能。然而，持续存在的两步电阻转变仍然是实现最佳超导性能的主要障碍。本文，我们表明La$_2$PrNi$_2$O$_{7-δ}$薄膜中的两步转变源于超导性的颗粒特性，具体而言，是两种不同的超导晶粒相通过约瑟夫森结网络共存耦合的结果。即使在30 K附近剩余电阻变得极小，$R(T)$曲线中仍会出现一个次级的、更低温度的转变。这种两步行为显著降低了零电阻转变温度$T_{c, zero}$$\approx$ 10 K，并限制了先进的光谱学研究。我们的研究结果揭示了薄膜中两步转变的微观机制，并强调了改善氧均匀性对于在该体系中实现体超导性的必要性。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Ziao Han et al. |
| 11 | **[d-Wave pair density wave superconductivity in a two-orbital model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07511v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Motivated by exploring superconductivity in multi-orbital systems, we study two orbital models of spinful fermions representing ($p_x,p_y$) or ($d_{xz}, d_{yz})$ orbitals on the square lattice. For minimal interorbital $t$-$J$ or $t$-$V$ on-site interactions, a random phase approximation uncovers regimes of instability towards incommensurate $d_{xy}$ pair density wave ($d$-PDW) superconductivity with driven by interband pairing. We study the competition of PDW order with uniform nodal $d_{xy}$ pairing states and magnetic and charge density wave (CDW) instabilities. At strong coupling, we derive an effective hard-core Cooper pair Hamiltonian which we study using a bosonic Gutzwiller ansatz to reveal a period-$2$ PDW over a wide range of fillings as well as a checkerboard CDW at quarter-filling. Our results apply to correlated multi-orbital materials with quasi-1D bands, Hubbard models on the square-octagon lattice, and atomic fermions in $p$-orbitals. Our work highlights the role of the orbital content and multiband Fermi surfaces in stabilizing interband PDW states.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>为探索多轨道体系中的超导电性，我们研究了方晶格上代表($p_x,p_y$)或($d_{xz}, d_{yz})$轨道的双轨道自旋费米子模型。对于最小化的轨道间$t$-$J$或$t$-$V$在位相互作用，随机相位近似揭示了体系向非公度$d_{xy}$配对密度波（$d$-PDW）超导态的不稳定性，该不稳定性由带间配对驱动。我们研究了PDW序与均匀节点$d_{xy}$配对态以及磁性与电荷密度波（CDW）不稳定性之间的竞争。在强耦合区域，我们推导出一个有效的硬核库珀对哈密顿量，并利用玻色型古兹维勒近似进行研究，结果揭示了在很宽的填充范围内存在周期为$2$的PDW态，以及在四分之一填充处存在棋盘格CDW态。我们的结果适用于具有准一维能带的相关多轨道材料、方-八边形晶格上的哈伯德模型以及$p$轨道中的原子费米子。我们的工作强调了轨道成分和多带费米面在稳定带间PDW态中的作用。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Samuel Vadnais et al. |
| 12 | **[Perpendicular electric field induced $s^\pm$-wave to $d$-wave superconducting transition in thin film La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07185v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Inspired by the possibility that superconducting properties may be altered by applying a perpendicular electric field in the Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) bilayer nickelate La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, we investigated the imbalanced two-orbital bilayer Hubbard model using dynamical cluster quantum Monte Carlo calculations. Focusing on the pairing symmetries induced by the electric field and their evolution with field strength in the undoped, hole-doped, and electron-doped regimes, we found that the $s^\pm$-wave pairing originating from the $d_{z^2}$ orbital is suppressed; while a pairing symmetry transition from $s^\pm$-wave to $d$-wave pairing occurs, driven by the interlayer $d_{z^2}$ orbital mismatch and the transfer of electrons into the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital under the applied electric field. Intriguingly, the $d$-wave pairing arising from the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital exhibits dome-like behavior with the electric field. Our large-scale many-body calculations align with the previous expectation from weak-coupling methods and provide further insight into the superconducting mechanism in RP nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>受Ruddlesden-Popper双层镍酸盐La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$中垂直电场可能改变超导性质的启发，我们利用动力学团簇量子蒙特卡罗计算研究了非平衡双轨道双层哈伯德模型。通过聚焦于电场诱导的配对对称性及其在未掺杂、空穴掺杂和电子掺杂区域随电场强度的演化，我们发现源于$d_{z^2}$轨道的$s^\pm$波配对被抑制；同时，在施加的电场下，由层间$d_{z^2}$轨道失配和电子向$d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道转移驱动，发生了从$s^\pm$波到$d$波配对的对称性转变。有趣的是，源于$d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道的$d$波配对随电场呈现穹顶状行为。我们的大规模多体计算与先前弱耦合方法的预期一致，并为理解RP镍酸盐的超导机制提供了进一步见解。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Yongping Wei et al. |
| 13 | **[Strongly Correlated Superconductivity in Twisted Bilayer Graphene: A Gutzwiller Study](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04631v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study strongly correlated superconductivity in magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene (MATBG) using variational Gutzwiller wavefunction where the Gutzwiller projector $\hat{P}_{R}$ is allowed to break charge U(1) symmetry to accommodate superconducting (SC) order. The ground state energy is evaluated via the Gutzwiller Approximation applied to an 8-band model consisting of correlated f-orbitals and uncorrelated c-orbitals, with interactions including onsite Coulomb repulsion $U$, phonon-mediated anti-Hund's coupling $\hat{H}_{J_A}$, and intra-orbital Hund's coupling $\hat{H}_{J_H}$. At filling $ν=2.5$, we map out the phase diagram as a function of $U$ and $J_A$, finding a dome-shaped Fermi liquid (FL) phase that separates a weakly correlated BCS-like SC (BCS-SC) at small $U$ from a strongly correlated SC (SC-SC) at large $U$. A nematic SC state, stabilized over a large region of the phase diagram including the realistic parameter regime of MATBG, acquires a nodal gap structure with V-shaped density of states at large $U$ via interaction-driven SC gap reconstruction. In the SC-SC regime, the off-diagonal (charge-U(1)-breaking) components of $\hat{P}_{R}$ strongly suppress $f$-orbital charge fluctuations while maintaining finite pairing order and a sizeable quasiparticle weight $Z$, distinguishing it from a conventional Mott insulator. We further identify a novel small Fermi liquid (sFL) state with effective Fermi surface volume $=ν+2$. Interestingly, in the intermediate- ($U \lesssim 40$ meV) and large-$U$ ($U \gtrsim 40$ meV) regimes, the conventional FL and the sFL are the lowest-energy normal phases, respectively, potentially serve as the parent states of the SC-SC phase. These results illuminate the interplay between strong correlations and unconventional pairing in MATBG, and establish a versatile Gutzwiller framework applicable to other strongly correlated superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们使用变分古兹维勒波函数研究魔角扭曲双层石墨烯中的强关联超导性，其中古兹维勒投影算符$\hat{P}_{R}$被允许破坏电荷U(1)对称性以容纳超导序。基态能量通过对一个由关联的f轨道和非关联的c轨道组成的八带模型应用古兹维勒近似进行评估，相互作用包括在位库仑排斥$U$、声子介导的反洪德耦合$\hat{H}_{J_A}$和轨道内洪德耦合$\hat{H}_{J_H}$。在填充数$ν=2.5$时，我们绘制了作为$U$和$J_A$函数的相图，发现了一个穹顶形的费米液体相，它将小$U$下的弱关联类BCS超导与大$U$下的强关联超导分离开来。一个向列超导态在相图的大片区域（包括MATBG的实际参数范围）内稳定存在，并通过相互作用驱动的超导能隙重构，在大$U$下获得了具有V形态密度的节点能隙结构。在SC-SC区域，$\hat{P}_{R}$的非对角（破坏电荷U(1)对称的）分量强烈抑制了$f$轨道的电荷涨落，同时保持了有限的配对序和相当大的准粒子权重$Z$，这将其与传统莫特绝缘体区分开来。我们进一步识别出一种新颖的小费米液体态，其有效费米面体积$=ν+2$。有趣的是，在中等$U$和大$U$区域，常规FL和sFL分别是能量最低的正常相，可能作为SC-SC相的母态。这些结果阐明了MATBG中强关联与非常规配对之间的相互作用，并建立了一个适用于其他强关联超导体的通用古兹维勒框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Matthew Shu Liang et al. |
| 14 | **[Turning non-superconducting elements into superconductors by quantum confinement and proximity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.07585v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Elemental good metals, including noble metals (Cu, Ag, Au) and several $s$-block elements, do not exhibit superconductivity in bulk at ambient pressure, mainly due to weak electron-phonon coupling that cannot overcome Coulomb repulsion. Quantum confinement in ultra-thin films reshapes the electronic spectrum and the density of states near the Fermi level, producing strong, often non-monotonic, thickness dependencies of the critical temperature in established superconductors. Here, we examine whether confinement alone, or combined with proximity effects, can induce superconductivity in metals that are non-superconducting in bulk form. We review recent theoretical progress and introduce a unified framework based on a confinement-generalized, isotropic one-band Eliashberg theory, where the normal density of states becomes energy dependent and key parameters ($E_F$, $λ$, $μ^$) acquire explicit thickness dependence. By numerically solving the Eliashberg equations using ab initio or experimentally determined electron-phonon spectral functions $α^2F(Ω)$ and Coulomb pseudopotentials $μ^$, and without adjustable parameters, we compute the critical temperature $T_c$ as a function of film thickness for representative noble, alkali, and alkaline-earth metals. The results predict that superconductivity emerges only in selected cases and within extremely narrow thickness windows, typically at sub-nanometer scales ($L \sim 0.4-0.6$ nm), indicating strong fine-tuning requirements for confinement-induced superconductivity in good metals. We also consider layered superconductor/normal-metal systems where confinement and proximity effects coexist. In these heterostructures, a substantial enhancement of the critical temperature is predicted, even when the constituent materials are non-superconducting or weak superconductors in bulk form.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>元素良金属，包括贵金属和几种s区元素，在常压体材料中不表现出超导性，这主要是由于弱的电子-声子耦合无法克服库仑排斥。超薄膜中的量子限域重塑了费米能级附近的电子能谱和态密度，导致已确立的超导体中临界温度产生强烈的、通常非单调的厚度依赖性。在此，我们研究单独限域，或限域与邻近效应结合，是否能在体材料形态为非超导的金属中诱导出超导性。我们回顾了最近的理论进展，并引入了一个基于限域推广的各向同性单带Eliashberg理论的统一框架，其中正常态密度变得与能量相关，关键参数获得了明确的厚度依赖性。通过使用第一性原理或实验确定的电子-声子谱函数和库仑赝势，数值求解Eliashberg方程（无任何可调参数），我们计算了代表性贵金属、碱金属和碱土金属的临界温度随薄膜厚度的函数关系。结果预测超导性仅在某些特定情况下、在极其狭窄的厚度窗口内（通常在亚纳米尺度）出现，表明良金属中限域诱导超导需要极强的精细调控。我们还考虑了限域与邻近效应共存的层状超导体/正常金属系统。在这些异质结构中，即使组成材料在体材料形态下是非超导或弱超导的，也预测了临界温度的显著增强。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Giovanni A. Ummarino et al. |
| 15 | **[Granular aluminum induced superconductivity in germanium for hole spin-based hybrid devices](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.21364v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In superconductor-semiconductor hybrid structures, superconductivity and spin polarization are competing effects because magnetic fields break Cooper pairs. They can be combined using thin films and in-plane magnetic fields, an approach that enabled the pursuit of Majorana zero modes, Kitaev chains, and Andreev spin qubits (ASQs), but remains challenging for materials with small in-plane g-factors. Here we show that granular aluminum (grAl), composed of nanometer-scale aluminum grains embedded in an amorphous oxide matrix, can overcome this limitation. By depositing grAl on Ge/SiGe heterostructures, we induce a hard superconducting gap with BCS peaks at 305 $μ$eV and magnetic-field resilience for both the in-plane and out-of-plane directions, allowing Zeeman splitting of Yu-Shiba-Rusinov (YSR) states beyond 50 $μ$eV (12 GHz). Leveraging this robustness, we reveal signatures of hole physics and demonstrate g-tensor tunability.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在超导体-半导体混合结构中，超导性与自旋极化是相互竞争的效应，因为磁场会破坏库珀对。利用薄膜和面内磁场可以将它们结合起来，这种方法使得追求马约拉纳零能模、Kitaev链和安德烈夫自旋量子比特成为可能，但对于面内g因子较小的材料仍然具有挑战性。在此，我们展示了由嵌入非晶氧化物基质中的纳米级铝颗粒组成的颗粒铝可以克服这一限制。通过在Ge/SiGe异质结构上沉积grAl，我们诱导出了一个具有305 μeV BCS峰的硬超导能隙，并且在面内和面外方向都具有磁场耐受性，使得Yu-Shiba-Rusinov态的塞曼分裂超过50 μeV。利用这种鲁棒性，我们揭示了空穴物理的特征并展示了g张量的可调性。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Giorgio Fabris et al. |
| 16 | **[Nonlinear phononics in LaFeAsO: Optical control of the crystal structure toward possible enhancement of superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.06745v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Nonlinear phononics provides a route to control crystal structures through light-induced phonon excitation. In this study, we apply nonlinear phononics to an iron-based superconductor, LaFeAsO, with the aim of tuning its crystal structure toward the ideal one to enhance superconductivity. We simulate light-induced phonon dynamics on the anharmonic lattice potential determined by first-principles calculations. We find that the anion height $h$, a key structural parameter in iron-based superconductors, approaches its ideal value when an appropriate infrared-active phonon mode is selectively excited. This result suggests the possibility of controlling crystal structures and enhancing superconductivity in iron-based superconductors based on the concept of nonlinear phononics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>非线性声子学为通过光诱导声子激发控制晶体结构提供了一条途径。在本研究中，我们将非线性声子学应用于铁基超导体LaFeAsO，旨在调控其晶体结构趋向理想结构以增强超导性。我们在由第一性原理计算确定的非谐晶格势上模拟了光诱导声子动力学。我们发现，当选择性地激发一个适当的红外活性声子模时，铁基超导体中的关键结构参数——阴离子高度$h$——会趋近其理想值。这一结果表明了基于非线性声子学概念控制铁基超导体晶体结构并增强其超导性的可能性。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Shu Kamiyama et al. |
| 17 | **[Interplay between Superconductivity and Altermagnetism in Disordered Materials and Heterostructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.04819v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the interplay between superconductivity and altermagnetism in disordered systems using recently derived quantum kinetic transport equations. Starting from this framework, we derive the Ginzburg-Landau free energy and identify, in addition to the conventional pair-breaking term, a coupling between the spin and the spatial variation of the superconducting order parameter. Two distinct effects emerge from this coupling. The first is a magnetoelectric effect, in which a supercurrent (i.e., a phase gradient) induces a spin texture; this contribution is quadratic in the phase gradient. The second effect arises when the magnitude, rather than the phase, of the superconducting order parameter varies in space, likewise leading to a finite magnetization. We show that these two contributions compete in the case of an Abrikosov vortex, where both the amplitude and phase of the order parameter vary spatially. The effect associated with amplitude variations also gives rise to a proximity-induced magnetization (PIM) in hybrid structures composed of a superconductor (S) and an altermagnet (AM). Using quasiclassical theory, we analyze the PIM in diffusive S/AM bilayers and S/AM/S Josephson junctions, and determine the induced magnetization profiles. In Josephson junctions, where both the PIM and the magnetoelectric effect coexist, we further predict the occurrence of $0$-$π$ transitions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们利用近期推导的量子动力学输运方程，研究了无序体系中超导性与交变磁性之间的相互作用。基于此框架，我们推导出金兹堡-朗道自由能，并识别出除常规的配对破坏项外，还存在自旋与超导序参数空间变化之间的耦合。该耦合产生两种不同的效应。第一种是磁电效应，即超电流（相位梯度）会诱导出自旋纹理；该贡献与相位梯度呈二次方关系。第二种效应则出现在超导序参数的大小（而非相位）在空间变化时，同样会导致有限的磁化强度。我们证明，在阿布里科索夫涡旋情形下，这两种贡献相互竞争，因为此时序参数的幅值和相位均在空间变化。与幅值变化相关的效应还会在由超导体（S）和交变磁体（AM）组成的混合结构中引起邻近诱导磁化（PIM）。利用准经典理论，我们分析了扩散型S/AM双层结构和S/AM/S约瑟夫森结中的PIM，并确定了诱导磁化分布。在PIM与磁电效应共存的约瑟夫森结中，我们进一步预测了0-π转变的发生。</p></details> | 2026-04-07 | Rodrigo de las Heras et al. |
| 18 | **[Pairing around a Single Dirac Point: A Unifying View of Kohn-Luttinger Superconductivity in Chern Bands, Quarter Metals, and Topological Surface States](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.13271v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconductivity of a single two-dimensional Dirac fermion offers a natural route to topological superconductivity. While usually considered extrinsic -- arising from proximity to a conventional superconductor -- we investigate when a doped Dirac cone can \emph{spontaneously} develop superconductivity from a short-range repulsive interaction $U$ via the Kohn--Luttinger mechanism. We show that an ideal, linear Dirac cone is immune to pairing at leading order in $U^2$. Superconductivity instead emerges only through higher-order in $k$ corrections to the dispersion, which are unavoidable in any lattice realization and crucially dictate the pairing symmetry. The form of the pairing thus reflects how the well-known obstruction to realizing a single Dirac cone on a lattice is circumvented. When a Dirac cone arises from broken time-reversal symmetry -- for instance, at a transition between Chern insulators or in a valley-polarized phase -- we find a topological $p - ip$ state whose chirality is opposite to that of the parent chiral metal above $T_c$. By contrast, for a surface Dirac cone of a 3D topological insulator, superconductivity is stabilized by anisotropies in the dispersion. For $C_{3v}$-symmetric warping, as in \ce{Bi2Te3}, pairing is strongest when the Fermi surface becomes hexagonal, leading to order in the $(d \pm id)\times(p+ip)$ channel with accidental near-nodes. In the highly anisotropic limit $v_x \gg v_y$, relevant to side surfaces of layered materials, the Fermi surface splits into two branches, and nesting favors a pairing symmetry $Δ\sim \mathrm{sgn}(k_x)\cos(k_y)$ reminiscent of organic superconductors.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>单个二维狄拉克费米子的超导电性为实现拓扑超导提供了一条自然路径。虽然通常认为这种超导性是外源的——源于与传统超导体的邻近效应——但我们研究了掺杂狄拉克锥何时能通过科恩-卢廷格机制，在短程排斥相互作用U下自发产生超导电性。我们证明，理想的线性狄拉克锥在U²的最低阶不受配对影响。超导电性仅通过色散关系中更高阶的k修正项出现，这在任何晶格实现中都是不可避免的，并且关键性地决定了配对对称性。因此，配对形式反映了如何在晶格上规避实现单个狄拉克锥的已知障碍。当狄拉克锥源于时间反演对称性破缺时——例如在陈绝缘体之间的相变或谷极化相中——我们发现一种拓扑p-ip态，其手性与高于Tc的母体手性金属的手性相反。相比之下，对于三维拓扑绝缘体的表面狄拉克锥，超导电性由色散各向异性所稳定。对于C3v对称的翘曲（如Bi2Te3中），当费米面变为六边形时配对最强，导致(d±id)×(p+ip)通道中的有序，并伴有偶然的近节点。在高度各向异性极限v_x ≫ v_y下（与层状材料的侧面相关），费米面分裂为两支，嵌套效应倾向于产生Δ∼ sgn(k_x)cos(k_y)的配对对称性，这让人联想到有机超导体。</p></details> | 2026-04-07 | Omid Tavakol et al. |
| 19 | **[Numerically Exact Study of Flat-Band Superconductivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.05997v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Current theories of high-temperature superconductivity in flat-band systems predict a linear dependence of the transition temperature on the attractive interaction, $T_c(U) = c|U|$. However, neither the value of $c$ nor the full nonlinear $T_c(U)$ curve -- with a maximum at large $|U|$ -- is known beyond mean-field and quantum geometry estimates. Using a controlled diagrammatic Monte Carlo technique, we trace the onset of superfluid response in the Lieb lattice with attractive Hubbard interaction. Focusing on the half-filled flat-band case, where the ordering mechanism differs fundamentally from both BCS and preformed Cooper pair scenarios, we find that the pairing response diverges linearly with decreasing temperature over a broad range of $U$, leading to a sharp crossover to long-range correlations at a characteristic temperature $T_*$, which provides a controlled upper bound on $T_c$. The highest $T_*$ occurs when all three bands touch at a single momentum point, potentially corresponding to high $T_c$ values.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>当前关于平带系统中高温超导的理论预测转变温度与吸引相互作用呈线性关系，即T_c(U) = c|U|。然而，除了平均场和量子几何估计外，c的值以及完整的非线性T_c(U)曲线（在大|U|处存在最大值）均属未知。利用受控的图蒙特卡洛技术，我们追踪了具有吸引哈伯德相互作用的利布晶格中超流响应的起始。聚焦于半填充平带情形（其有序机制与BCS和预形成库珀对方案均有根本不同），我们发现，在很宽的U范围内，配对响应随温度降低呈线性发散，导致在特征温度T_*处出现向长程关联的急剧 crossover，这为T_c提供了一个受控的上限。最高的T_*出现在所有三个能带在单个动量点接触时，这可能对应于较高的T_c值。</p></details> | 2026-04-07 | I. S. Tupitsyn et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |

| 1 | **[Swap Network Augmented Ansätze on Arbitrary Connectivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.23679v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient parametrizations of quantum states are essential for trainable hybrid classical-quantum algorithms. A key challenge in their design consists in adapting to the available qubit connectivity of the quantum processor, which limits the capacity to generate correlations between distant qubits in a resource-efficient and trainable manner. In this work we first introduce an algorithm that optimizes qubit routing for arbitrary connectivity graphs, resulting in a swap network that enables direct interactions between any pair of qubits. We then propose a co-design of circuit layers and qubit routing by embedding the derived swap networks within layered, connectivity-aware ansätze. This construction significantly improves the trainability of the ansatz, leading to enhanced performance with reduced resources. We showcase these improvements through ground-state simulations of strongly correlated systems, including spin-glass and molecular electronic structure models. Across exemplified connectivities, the swap-enhanced ansatz consistently achieves lower energy errors using fewer entangling gates, shallower circuits, and fewer parameters than standard layered-structured baselines. Our results indicate that swap network augmented ansätze provide enhanced trainability and resource-efficient design to capture complex correlations on devices with constrained qubit connectivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子态的高效参数化对于可训练的经典-量子混合算法至关重要。其设计中的一个关键挑战在于如何适应量子处理器有限的比特连接性，这限制了以资源高效且可训练的方式在远距离比特间生成关联的能力。在本工作中，我们首先提出一种针对任意连接图优化比特路由的算法，生成一个交换网络，使得任意比特对之间能够直接相互作用。随后，我们通过将推导出的交换网络嵌入到分层的、连接感知的拟设中，提出了电路层与比特路由的协同设计。这种构造显著改善了拟设的可训练性，从而以更少的资源实现更优的性能。我们通过对强关联系统（包括自旋玻璃和分子电子结构模型）的基态模拟来展示这些改进。在所有示例连接性中，相较于标准的分层结构基线，交换增强的拟设始终能以更少的纠缠门、更浅的电路深度和更少的参数实现更低的能量误差。我们的结果表明，交换网络增强的拟设为在比特连接受限的设备上捕获复杂关联提供了更强的可训练性和资源高效的设计方案。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Teodor Parella-Dilmé et al. |
| 2 | **[The Random Subsequence Model and Uniform Codes for the Deletion Channel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07234v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce the Random Subsequence Model, a spin glass model on pairs of random strings $(X,Y) \in \{0,1\}^N \times \{0,1\}^M$ whose partition function counts subsequence embeddings of $Y$ into $X$. We study two variants: the null model, where $X$ and $Y$ are independent and uniform, and the planted model, where $X$ is uniform and $Y$ is a uniformly-random length-$M$ subsequence of $X$. We connect the Random Subsequence Model to longstanding problems in various fields, including the best rate achievable by uniformly-random codes in the deletion channel, the longest common subsequence problem between two random strings, and models of directed polymers in statistical physics. In the regime where $N,M\to\infty$ at a fixed ratio $α= M/N \in (0,1)$, we exhibit strict asymptotic separations between the null annealed free energy and the quenched free energies of the null and planted models at all values of the density parameter $α$. This suggests that these models are in a spin glass phase at zero temperature throughout the entire dense regime. As a consequence, we show that uniformly-random codes achieve a positive rate in the deletion channel for all deletion probabilities $p\in [0,1),$ settling multiple conjectures of the second author, Isik and Weissman (2024) and proving the first such positive rate result for the regime $p \geq 1/2$. We also give an exact analytic formula for the annealed free energy of the planted model for all values of the density parameter. This implies a corresponding analytic upper bound on the best rate achievable by uniformly-random codes in the deletion channel, complementing the lower bound from our first result. Our upper and lower bounds for the capacity of the deletion channel under uniform codes are far closer to each other than the best known upper and lower bounds for the capacity of the deletion channel.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入了随机子序列模型，这是一个定义在随机字符串对$(X,Y) \in \{0,1\}^N \times \{0,1\}^M$上的自旋玻璃模型，其配分函数计算$Y$嵌入$X$的子序列数。我们研究了两种变体：零模型（其中$X$和$Y$独立且均匀）和植入模型（其中$X$均匀，$Y$是$X$中均匀随机选取的长度为$M$的子序列）。我们将随机子序列模型与多个领域的长期问题联系起来，包括均匀随机码在删除信道中可实现的最佳速率、两个随机字符串间的最长公共子序列问题，以及统计物理学中的有向聚合物模型。在$N,M\to\infty$且固定比率$α= M/N \in (0,1)$的范围内，我们展示了在所有密度参数$α$值下，零模型的退火自由能与零模型及植入模型的淬火自由能之间存在严格的渐近分离。这表明这些模型在整个稠密区域内都处于零温下的自旋玻璃相。因此，我们证明了均匀随机码在所有删除概率$p\in [0,1)$下都能在删除信道中实现正速率，从而解决了第二作者、Isik和Weissman（2024）的多个猜想，并首次为$p \geq 1/2$区域证明了此类正速率结果。我们还给出了植入模型在所有密度参数值下的退火自由能的精确解析公式。这隐含了均匀随机码在删除信道中可实现的最佳速率的一个相应的解析上界，补充了我们第一个结果中的下界。我们得到的均匀随机码下删除信道容量的上下界，比目前已知的删除信道容量的最佳上下界要接近得多。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Ryan Jeong et al. |
| 3 | **[Existence of a Phase Transition in the One-Dimensional Ising Spin Glass Model with Long-Range Interactions on the Nishimori Line](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07130v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Dyson [Commun. Math. Phys. 12, 91 (1969)] rigorously proved the existence of a phase transition in the one-dimensional Ising model with long-range interactions of the form $r^{-α}$ for $1 < α< 2$. In the present study, we extend this result to the Ising spin glass model with Gaussian disorder on the Nishimori line. Following Dyson's method, we first prove the existence of long-range order at finite low temperatures in the Dyson hierarchical Ising spin glass model on the Nishimori line, with power-law-like interactions $J(r) \sim r^{-α}$ for $1 < α< 3/2$. The key ingredients of the proof are the interpolation method developed in the rigorous analysis of mean-field spin glass models, the Gibbs--Bogoliubov inequality on the Nishimori line, and the Tsirelson--Ibragimov--Sudakov inequality (Gaussian concentration inequality). We then use the Griffiths inequality on the Nishimori line to rigorously establish the existence of a phase transition in the one-dimensional Ising spin glass model with long-range interactions on the Nishimori line for $1 < α< 3/2$. For $α\ge 3/2$, the existence of a phase transition remains an open problem.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Dyson [Commun. Math. Phys. 12, 91 (1969)] 严格证明了一维伊辛模型在具有形式为$r^{-α}$（$1 < α< 2$）的长程相互作用时存在相变。在本研究中，我们将此结果扩展到西岛线上的高斯无序伊辛自旋玻璃模型。遵循Dyson的方法，我们首先证明了西岛线上具有幂律型相互作用$J(r) \sim r^{-α}$（$1 < α< 3/2$）的Dyson分层伊辛自旋玻璃模型在有限低温下存在长程序。证明的关键要素包括：在平均场自旋玻璃模型严格分析中发展出的插值法、西岛线上的Gibbs--Bogoliubov不等式，以及Tsirelson--Ibragimov--Sudakov不等式（高斯集中不等式）。然后，我们利用西岛线上的Griffiths不等式，严格确立了西岛线上具有长程相互作用的一维伊辛自旋玻璃模型在$1 < α< 3/2$时存在相变。对于$α\ge 3/2$，相变的存在性仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Manaka Okuyama et al. |
| 4 | **[Geometric Entropy and Retrieval Phase Transitions in Continuous Thermal Dense Associative Memory](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07401v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We study the thermodynamic memory capacity of modern Hopfield networks (Dense Associative Memory models) with continuous states under geometric constraints, extending classical analyses of pairwise associative memory. We derive thermodynamic phase boundaries for Dense Associative Memory networks with exponential capacity $p = e^{αN}$, comparing Gaussian (LSE) and Epanechnikov (LSR) kernels. For continuous neurons on an $N$-sphere, the geometric entropy depends solely on the spherical geometry, not the kernel. In the sharp-kernel regime, the maximum theoretical capacity $α= 0.5$ is achieved at zero temperature; below this threshold, a critical line separates retrieval from a spin-glass phase. The two kernels differ qualitatively in their phase boundary structure: for LSE, the retrieval region extends to arbitrarily high temperatures as $α\to 0$, but interference from spurious patterns is always present. For LSR, the finite support introduces a threshold $α_{\text{th}}$ below which no spurious patterns contribute to the noise floor, producing a qualitatively different retrieval regime in this sub-threshold region. These results advance the theory of high-capacity associative memory and clarify fundamental limits of retrieval robustness in modern attention-like memory architectures.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们在几何约束下研究了具有连续状态的现代霍普菲尔德网络（密集关联记忆模型）的热力学记忆容量，扩展了对成对关联记忆的经典分析。我们推导了具有指数容量 $p = e^{αN}$ 的密集关联记忆网络的热力学相边界，并比较了高斯核（LSE）与埃帕涅奇尼科夫核（LSR）。对于 $N$ 维球面上的连续神经元，几何熵仅取决于球面几何，而与核函数无关。在锐核机制下，最大理论容量 $α= 0.5$ 在零温度下实现；低于此阈值，一条临界线将检索相与自旋玻璃相分离。两种核的相边界结构存在质的差异：对于LSE，当 $α\to 0$ 时，检索区域可延伸至任意高温，但伪模式的干扰始终存在。对于LSR，其有限支撑引入了一个阈值 $α_{\text{th}}$，低于该阈值时，没有伪模式对噪声基底产生贡献，从而在该亚阈值区域产生了一个性质不同的检索机制。这些结果推进了高容量关联记忆的理论，并阐明了现代类注意力记忆架构中检索鲁棒性的基本极限。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Tatiana Petrova et al. |
| 5 | **[A solvable model of noisy coupled oscillators with fully random interactions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.04404v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce a solvable spherical model of coupled oscillators with fully random interactions and distributed natural frequencies. Using the dynamical mean-field theory, we derive self-consistent equations for the steady-state response and correlation functions. We show that any finite width of the natural-frequency distribution suppresses the finite-temperature spin-glass transition, because the resulting low-frequency singularity of the correlation function is incompatible with the spherical constraint. At zero temperature, however, a spin-glass phase persists for arbitrary frequency dispersion. This residual zero-temperature glassiness is likely a special feature of the spherical dynamics and would be destroyed by local nonlinearities. The model thus provides a solvable oscillator framework for studying how nonequilibrium perturbations suppress finite-temperature glassy freezing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入了一个具有完全随机相互作用和分布自然频率的耦合振子的可解球面模型。利用动力学平均场理论，我们推导了稳态响应和相关函数的自洽方程。我们证明，自然频率分布的任意有限宽度都会抑制有限温度下的自旋玻璃相变，因为由此产生的相关函数的低频奇异性与球面约束不相容。然而，在零温下，对于任意的频率色散，自旋玻璃相仍然存在。这种残余的零温玻璃态很可能是球面动力学的一个特殊特征，并且会被局域非线性所破坏。因此，该模型为研究非平衡扰动如何抑制有限温度下的玻璃态冻结提供了一个可解的振子框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-06 | Harukuni Ikeda et al. |
| 6 | **[Michel Talagrand and the Rigorous Theory of Mean Field Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.12595v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Michel Talagrand played a decisive role in the transformation of mean-field spin glass theory into a rigorous mathematical subject. This chapter offers a narrative account of that development. We begin with the physical origins of the Sherrington-Kirkpatrick (SK) model and the emergence of the TAP and Almeida-Thouless stability frameworks, culminating in Parisi's replica symmetry breaking (RSB) ansatz and its hierarchical order parameter. We then review early rigorous milestones, including high-temperature results and stability identities, and describe the consolidation of interpolation and cavity methods through the work of Guerra and of Aizenman-Sims-Starr. The central event in this narrative is Talagrand's 2006 proof of the Parisi formula for the SK model and for a broad class of mixed $p$-spin models, and his subsequent analysis of Parisi measures. We also discuss Talagrand's later program constructing pure states under extended Ghirlanda-Guerra identities and an atom at the maximal overlap, together with the structural results that followed, notably Panchenko's ultrametricity theorem and extensions of the Parisi formula. Throughout, we indicate how related contributions by many authors fit into the same long-running program across probability, analysis, and mathematical physics.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Michel Talagrand 在将平均场自旋玻璃理论转变为一门严谨的数学学科过程中发挥了决定性作用。本章对这一发展历程进行了叙述性描述。我们从Sherrington-Kirkpatrick（SK）模型的物理起源、TAP和Almeida-Thouless稳定性框架的出现开始，最终到Parisi的复本对称破缺（RSB）拟设及其分层序参数。然后，我们回顾了早期的严格里程碑，包括高温结果和稳定性恒等式，并描述了通过Guerra以及Aizenman-Sims-Starr的工作，插值法和空腔法的巩固。这一叙述中的核心事件是Talagrand在2006年对SK模型及一大类混合$p$-自旋模型的Parisi公式的证明，以及他随后对Parisi测度的分析。我们还讨论了Talagrand后来在扩展的Ghirlanda-Guerra恒等式和最大交叠处原子条件下构建纯态的计划，以及随之而来的结构结果，特别是Panchenko的超度量定理和Parisi公式的扩展。自始至终，我们指出了许多作者的相关贡献如何融入概率论、分析和数学物理这一长期研究计划中。</p></details> | 2026-04-06 | Sourav Chatterjee et al. |
| 7 | **[Variational Iterative Rotation Algorithm: Combinatorial Optimization with Classical Kicked Tops](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.01512v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate a classical formulation of the Quantum Approximate Optimization Algorithm (QAOA), realized as a Hamiltonian dynamical system of classical kicked tops, which we call the Variational Iterative Rotation Algorithm (VIRAL). The variational parameters are the transverse and longitudinal rotation angles at each of the p layers of the circuit. We find that VIRAL outperforms QAOA on the canonical Sherrington-Kirkpatrick spin-glass benchmark at all circuit depths, with the energy density converging to the ground state value linearly in 1/p. For large circuit depths, the optimized dynamics follows a Floquet protocol in which a pitchfork bifurcation destabilizes the equatorial fixed point and drives the spins toward polar Ising configurations. Our results demonstrate that the effectiveness of QAOA-like protocols derives primarily from their underlying iterative rotation structure, and that a classical implementation of it outperforms its quantum counterpart. We further elucidate its efficiency by reducing the many-body classical evolution to an effective Landau-Lifshitz dynamics for a single spin in a stochastic magnetic field. In this picture, the covariance matrix of the effective field reveals a nearly rank-one structure in which a single mode dominates the stochastic dynamics. In contrast, quantum fluctuations make the noise covariance of the effective quantum model of higher rank, hampering the control of the system. We propose nanometer-scale magnetic tunnel junctions as a natural physical platform for implementing VIRAL, where spin rotations can be realized using magnetic fields and spin torques.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了量子近似优化算法（QAOA）的一种经典表述，它被实现为一个经典受击陀螺的哈密顿动力系统，我们称之为变分迭代旋转算法（VIRAL）。变分参数是电路$p$层中每一层的横向和纵向旋转角度。我们发现，在标准Sherrington-Kirkpatrick自旋玻璃基准测试中，VIRAL在所有电路深度上都优于QAOA，其能量密度以$1/p$的线性速度收敛到基态值。对于大电路深度，优化后的动力学遵循一个Floquet协议，其中叉式分岔使赤道不动点失稳，并将自旋驱动向极向伊辛构型。我们的结果表明，类QAOA协议的有效性主要源于其底层的迭代旋转结构，并且其经典实现优于其量子对应物。我们通过将多体经典演化简化为随机磁场中单个自旋的有效Landau-Lifshitz动力学，进一步阐明了其效率。在这一图像中，有效场的协方差矩阵揭示了一个近乎秩为一的结构，其中单一模式主导了随机动力学。相比之下，量子涨落使得有效量子模型的噪声协方差具有更高的秩，从而阻碍了对系统的控制。我们提出纳米尺度磁隧道结作为实现VIRAL的天然物理平台，其中自旋转动可以通过磁场和自旋转矩来实现。</p></details> | 2026-04-02 | Flaviano Morone et al. |
